gaps.description: C-24 summary line (report line 2) overstates the shared-brand co-occurrence set: it names Fender/Pasadena/Yamaha/Takamine as byte-identical 'across en/sk/cs/cz', but the en SSE contains none of Pasadena/Yamaha/Takamine (en chips = Ernie Ball/PSD Guitars/DR Strings/Fender). The authoritative cross-language identity table (lines 108-110) correctly scopes those three brands to (sk/cs/cz) and (cs/cz). The C-24 grading itself is sound and methodologically correct; this is a precision defect in one summary sentence.
gaps.evidence: [verified: docs/v2-design/_runs/subtask10-reverify/v2-en-guitar-miss.sse] en chips = {Ernie Ball, PSD Guitars, DR Strings, Fender}, no Pasadena/Yamaha/Takamine; contradicts report line 2 brand list scoped 'across en/sk/cs/cz'. Authoritative table at report lines 108-110 scopes these to (sk/cs/cz)/(cs/cz).
gaps.fix_hint: Reword report line 2 so the brand list scoping matches the cross-language table: Fender is the only brand identical across all four; Pasadena/Yamaha across sk/cs/cz; Takamine across cs/cz. should-be-issue if not fixed this round.
